title: Top Companies in Cannabis Market: Canopy Growth, Curaleaf, Cresco Labs and Industry Leaders
text: Canada Legal Cannabis Market valued at USD 3.25 billion in 2024 projected to reach USD 5.79 billion by 2030 rising at CAGR of 12.00%. Canopy Growth Corporation ranks among major cannabis market players globally alongside Curaleaf, Cresco Labs, Green Thumb Industries and Tilray Brands. Canopy Growth is leading global cannabis and consumer packaged goods company managing diverse portfolio of award-winning brands for recreational and medical markets. Canadian brands include Tweed, DOJA, Deep Space, Ace Valley, 7ACRES, Twd., Vert, Wana and Hiway offering flowers, edibles and beverages. Major cannabis companies have used organic and inorganic growth strategies including collaborations, acquisitions, product launches, partnerships and expansions to strengthen international presence. Canopy successfully launched Claybourne's Frosted Flyers infused pre-rolls in Canada bolstering competitive edge in rapidly growing adult-use market. Recreational segment dominated market in 2025 and anticipated to grow at fastest CAGR over forecast period due to growing consumption in vapes, foods and beverages.
